blur, low quality, distort, flicker, warping, jitter, morphing, watermark, subtitles, text overlay
Generate Kling prompts as strict JSON segments with continuity.
Default to single location. Keep character identity stable across all segments.
@Element1 is actor identity and continuity anchor.

Pipeline up to 60s with auto-skip by script length.

How skip works:
- script is split into ~10s segments
- segment_count from parser controls CC Segment Image Gate nodes
- if segment_index > segment_count, gate returns ExecutionBlocker, so corresponding Kling + SaveVideo nodes are skipped

Frame rule requested:
- Segment1 uses frame1->frame2
- Segment2 uses frame2->frame3 if connected; otherwise end_frame stays empty
- Same logic for later segments

In this template:
- Segment1 end_frame is pre-connected to frame2
- Segment2..6 end_frame are intentionally left empty by default
- Connect frame3..frame7 manually when available

Important:
- Set KlingStartEndFrameNode widgets to Kling 3.0 / Multi-Scene Auto options available in your local build
- Copy prompts from Preview nodes 1..6 into matching Kling segment widgets
- For short scripts (e.g., 20s), only segment 1-2 execute; 3-6 are auto-skipped
